summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CASUAL sportswear category feature. All 19 requested features verified. Backend APIs (100% pass rate - 9/9 tests), Frontend UI & integrations (100% pass rate - all tests passed).
seed_data_creation: 15 casual products seeded automatically on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casual feature fully tested and working. Toggle is currently ON. Products use SVG placeholders (user will replace with JPGs). Size Helper wizard works with garment-specific inputs (height+weight for pants, weight-only for tricou/vesta).

backend_get_casual_products_visibility.details: Returns products when visible=true, empty list when visible=false

frontend_casual_page_loads.details: Page loads with 15 products displayed in grid

frontend_category_filters.details: Toate (15), Pantaloni Scurti (3), Pantaloni Lungi (2), Vesta (1), Tricouri (9)

frontend_filter_click.details: Clicking Tricouri filter shows 9 products correctly

frontend_color_selector.details: Color buttons change selected state with visual highlight

frontend_ajutor_marimi_button.details: Each product has AJUTOR MARIMI button

frontend_size_helper_opens.details: Size Helper popup opens when clicking AJUTOR MARIMI

frontend_size_helper_step1.details: Shows 4 garment types: Pantaloni Scurti, Pantaloni Lungi, Tricou, Vesta/Geaca

frontend_size_helper_step2_pants.details: Height + Weight inputs shown for pants

frontend_size_helper_step2_tricou.details: Weight-only input shown for tricou/vesta (height hidden)

frontend_product_size_buttons.details: Products have size buttons (M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL)

frontend_add_to_cart.details: Add to Cart button works, shows toast notification

frontend_toggle_state_change.details: Toggle changes state and shows toast notification

frontend_navbar_casual_link.details: CASUAL link shown in navbar when enabled

frontend_coming_soon.details: 'Coming Soon' page shown when casual is disabled with March 15, 2026 date
